title: Build branch-aware canvas-first interaction
action: Replace the fixed single-path scenario map and permanent 390px right detail panel with a canvas-first recommender surface. Add branch-aware state types CanvasNode, CanvasEdge, CanvasBranch, CanvasRouteState with activeBranchId. Render a central scenario/state node, recommendation command nodes, branch edges, evidence cards, and edge note controls. Remove the workspace grid dependency on grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr) 390px.
implementation: Create initial canvas state from simulated project state and recommendCommands output.
Add a UI control to expand a recommendation into a new branch and set activeBranchId.
Show recommendation rationale, confidence label, equal-rank status, and source evidence in contextual cards inside or below the canvas.
Add an edge note input or button-driven note editor so users can record why a route choice was made.
Refactor CSS so .workspace is canvas-first and no permanent large detail sidebar remains.
Update tests and e2e smoke to assert the central node, branch expansion, recommendation evidence, and edge notes are visible/useful.

criteria: [UI-observable] npm run test:e2e exits 0 and verifies branch expansion plus recommendation evidence
